message:
refactor(mcp): replace glob test imports with explicit named imports in mcp_client and mcp_proxy (ft-181uk)

Continue the framework import isolation work from eb7a3bf1: replace
`use super::*` glob imports in the `#[cfg(test)]` modules of
mcp_client.rs and mcp_proxy.rs with explicit named imports.

mcp_client.rs: add `use std::collections::HashMap` and explicit
imports from the parent module instead of wildcard.

mcp_proxy.rs: same treatment for the test module — named imports
only, no glob.

Zero semantic change — purely import hygiene to make test module
dependencies explicit and auditable.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
